title: Russia launches massive missile strike on Ukrainian energy infrastructure
summary: Russian forces struck multiple power plants across Ukraine in the largest wave of attacks this winter.

title: Norway approves new deep-sea mining licenses in Arctic waters
summary: The Norwegian parliament voted to open portions of the Arctic seabed to deep-sea mining, citing critical mineral needs.

title: Bellingcat identifies FSB officers behind Navalny poisoning
summary: Open-source investigators traced the poisoning to a team of FSB chemical-weapons specialists.

title: NATO summit in Vilnius agrees new defense spending targets
summary: Leaders agreed to raise minimum defense spending to 2% of GDP and accelerate force modernization.

title: China expands rare-earth export controls amid tech war
summary: Beijing imposed new licensing requirements on gallium and germanium exports, escalating trade tensions.

title: Mass protests erupt in Georgia over 'foreign agent' law
summary: Tens of thousands gathered in Tbilisi to protest a Kremlin-inspired law targeting civil society funding.

title: Suspected Russian sabotage severs undersea cable in Baltic Sea
summary: A fiber-optic cable between Sweden and Estonia was damaged in what officials suspect was deliberate sabotage.

title: Iran enriches uranium to 84% purity, IAEA confirms
summary: The International Atomic Energy Agency reported Iran has produced uranium enriched to near weapons-grade levels.

title: US deploys additional F-35 squadrons to RAF Lakenheath
summary: The Pentagon announced a rotational deployment of F-35A fighters to bolster NATO air policing.

title: OCCRP reveals offshore network linked to Russian oligarch sanctions evasion
summary: A network of shell companies in Cyprus and the UAE helped oligarchs evade EU sanctions.

title: Arctic ice melt opens new shipping route north of Russia
summary: Record low sea ice this summer has made the Northern Sea Route navigable for longer periods.

title: EU agrees 14th sanctions package targeting Russian LNG
summary: The new package bans future investments and services related to Russian liquefied natural gas projects.

title: Cyberattack disrupts Norwegian hospital networks
summary: A ransomware attack forced several hospitals to shut down IT systems and reschedule procedures.

title: Houthi missile strikes commercial vessel in Gulf of Aden
summary: The Iran-backed group claimed responsibility for an attack on a Liberian-flagged container ship.

title: Sweden joins NATO as 32nd member
summary: Stockholm formally acceded to the North Atlantic Treaty after nearly two years of negotiations.

title: Local LLM runs at 120 tok/s on MacBook Pro with M3 Max
summary: A new speculative-decoding technique allows Qwen3.6-32B to run locally at usable speeds.

title: L'Oréal launches AI-powered skincare recommendation engine
summary: The beauty giant partnered with OpenAI to personalize product recommendations.

title: FIFA announces expanded 48-team format for 2026 World Cup
summary: The World Cup will feature 104 matches across three host nations.

title: Russia withdraws from Black Sea grain deal
summary: Moscow suspended participation in the UN-brokered agreement, threatening global food exports.

title: Norwegian intelligence warns of increased Russian SIGINT activity in Arctic
summary: E-tjenesten reported a sharp rise in Russian signals intelligence collection near Svalbard.
